canonical_definition: The latent ability of an LLM to adjust its responses in terms of language, complexity, and content to match the cognitive and developmental stage of students at different grade levels.
papers: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding

definitions.text: The latent ability of an LLM to adjust its responses in terms of language, complexity, and content to match the cognitive and developmental stage of students at different grade levels.
definitions.paper: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding

definitions.text: The degree to which model outputs are appropriate for a learner's developmental stage, including age-appropriate vocabulary, tone, and complexity.
definitions.paper: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding

relationships.paper: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding
relationships.evidence: To the best of our knowledge, EDUADAPT is the ﬁrst benchmark designed speciﬁcally for evaluating grade-level adaptability of LLMs across the full K-12 system. (Section 1)
